public_witness.note: CONFIRMED 2026-07-12. `ots upgrade` returned Success (exit 0) and the committed witness-proof.opentimestamps now embeds BitcoinBlockHeaderAttestation(957642) and (957644) via the alice + bob calendars (`ots info`). Both blocks' merkle roots were INDEPENDENTLY cross-checked against a public explorer (mempool.space) and match the attestations exactly — the same check `ots verify` performs. A local `ots verify` needs a Bitcoin node (not run in the maintainer's offline env); it is reproducible by anyone running a node, or by re-fetching blocks 957642/957644. The catallaxy + finney calendar paths remain pending (a proof is complete once any one path resolves to a Bitcoin block).

identity_note: The identity-anchored externally_anchored rung is intentionally NOT pursued — the party requires anonymity, and that rung requires revealing a real identity via Sigstore/OIDC. The de-identified public witness (above) is the honest ceiling for an anonymous party; now that Bitcoin has confirmed, independence stays distinct_key_only with a VERIFIED de-identified public_witness (NOT the identity rung — the score stays Frontier 9.4, not 9.5).
non_claim: NOT rsp_unredacted_report_compliance; over the Opus 4.6 PUBLIC structure only; ratings are the party's own independent assessments (NOT attributed to METR, Anthropic, or any named reviewer); does not observe the confidential report or Anthropic's real review panel; affiliation axis modeled.
